', a, re.DOTALL) desc = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', desc_match.group(1)).strip() if desc_match else "" desc = re.sub(r'&', '&', desc) # Language lang_match = re.search(r'itemprop="programmingLanguage"[^>]*>(.*?)', a) lang = lang_match.group(1).strip() if lang_match else "—" # Stars today today_match = re.search(r'([\d,]+)\s+stars? today', a) today = today_match.group(1) if today_match else "—" # Total stars - look for star count near stargazers link star_match = re.search(r'href="[^"]+/stargazers"[^>]*>\s*(?:<[^>]+>\s*)*\s*([\d,]+)', a) if not star_match: # Try another pattern star_match = re.search(r'stargazers[^>]*>.*?\s*([\d,]+)', a, re.DOTALL) stars = star_match.group(1).strip() if star_match else "—" # Forks fork_match = re.search(r'network/members[^>]*>.*?\s*([\d,]+)', a, re.DOTALL) forks = fork_match.group(1).strip() if fork_match else "—" results.append((repo_href, lang, stars, forks, today, desc)) for i, (repo, lang, stars, forks, today, desc) in enumerate(results, 1): print(f"{i:2}. {repo}") print(f" Lang: {lang} | ⭐ Stars: {stars} | 🍴 Forks: {forks} | 🔥 Today: +{today}") if desc: print(f" {desc[:120]}") print() EOF
